title: Tsor`ah #6881
definition:
Zareah or Zoreah or Zorah = "hornet"

 1) a town in Dan, residence of Manoah and the home town of Samson
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zareah or Zoreah or Zorah = "hornet"

 1) a town in Dan, residence of Manoah and the home town of Samson

    NASB:  a city exchanged by Judah and Dan
